'''''Dusk Trader''''' was a [[MB-C1 medium transport]] seen near the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] customs station to [[Zhar/Legends|Zhar]] during the [[Mission to Zhar]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''

[[Category:MB-C1 medium transports]]
